BerryTree_Text_WantToPlant.label: BerryTree_Text_WantToPlant
BerryTree_Text_WantToPlant.raw_text: 这是松软的土地。\n想要种植一个树果吗？$
BerryTree_Text_WantToPlant.display_text:
这是松软的土地。
想要种植一个树果吗？

BerryTree_Text_PlantedOneBerry.label: BerryTree_Text_PlantedOneBerry
BerryTree_Text_PlantedOneBerry.display_text:
{PLAYER}在松软的土地上
种植了{STR_VAR_1}。

encoding.hex: FD 01 0F E6 0C 6C 0B 6D 03 0B 0D 29 03 1F 0B AD FE 10 A7 10 83 08 9E FD 02 37 FF

BerryTree_Text_BerryGrowthStage1.label: BerryTree_Text_BerryGrowthStage1
BerryTree_Text_BerryGrowthStage1.raw_text: 种有{STR_VAR_1}的地方！$种有{STR_VAR_1}的地方！$
BerryTree_Text_BerryGrowthStage1.display_text: 种有{STR_VAR_1}的地方！$种有{STR_VAR_1}的地方！

BerryTree_Text_BerryGrowthStage3.label: BerryTree_Text_BerryGrowthStage3
BerryTree_Text_BerryGrowthStage3.raw_text: {STR_VAR_1}的幼苗长得很漂亮！${STR_VAR_1}正在变得更高。$
BerryTree_Text_BerryGrowthStage3.display_text: {STR_VAR_1}的幼苗长得很漂亮！${STR_VAR_1}正在变得更高。

BerryTree_Text_WantToPick.label: BerryTree_Text_WantToPick
BerryTree_Text_WantToPick.display_text:
你找到了{STR_VAR_2}个{STR_VAR_1}！

要摘下
{STR_VAR_1}吗？

BerryTree_Text_PutAwayBerry.label: BerryTree_Text_PutAwayBerry
BerryTree_Text_PutAwayBerry.raw_text: {PLAYER}将{STR_VAR_1}\n放入包包的树果口袋中。\p这里变回了松软的土地。$

BerryTree_Text_BerryPocketFull.label: BerryTree_Text_BerryPocketFull
BerryTree_Text_BerryPocketFull.raw_text: 因为包包的树果口袋已满。\p所以放弃了摘取{STR_VAR_1}。$
BerryTree_Text_BerryPocketFull.display_text:
因为包包的树果口袋已满。

所以放弃了摘取{STR_VAR_1}。

BerryTree_Text_WantToWater.label: BerryTree_Text_WantToWater
BerryTree_Text_WantToWater.raw_text: 要用吼吼鲸喷壶给{STR_VAR_1}\n浇水吗？$
BerryTree_Text_WantToWater.display_text:
要用吼吼鲸喷壶给{STR_VAR_1}
浇水吗？

BerryTree_Text_WantToPick_Mutation.label: BerryTree_Text_WantToPick_Mutation
BerryTree_Text_WantToPick_Mutation.raw_text: 你找到了{STR_VAR_2}、{STR_VAR_1}\n与一个 {STR_VAR_3}！\p你想要摘下它们吗？？$

BerryTree_Text_BerryLeftUnpicked_Mutatio.label: BerryTree_Text_BerryLeftUnpicked_Mutation
BerryTree_Text_BerryLeftUnpicked_Mutatio.raw_text: {PLAYER} 离开了 {STR_VAR_1}\n并且 {STR_VAR_3} 没有被采摘。$
BerryTree_Text_BerryLeftUnpicked_Mutatio.display_text:
{PLAYER} 离开了 {STR_VAR_1}
并且 {STR_VAR_3} 没有被采摘。

BerryTree_Text_BerryPocketFull_Mutation.label: BerryTree_Text_BerryPocketFull_Mutation
BerryTree_Text_BerryPocketFull_Mutation.raw_text: 包包的果实袋已满。\p{STR_VAR_1} 和 {STR_VAR_3} 无法\n被采摘。$
BerryTree_Text_BerryPocketFull_Mutation.display_text:
包包的果实袋已满。

{STR_VAR_1} 和 {STR_VAR_3} 无法
被采摘。

BerryTree_Text_PutAwayBerry_Mutation.label: BerryTree_Text_PutAwayBerry_Mutation
BerryTree_Text_PutAwayBerry_Mutation.raw_text:
{PLAYER} 将 {STR_VAR_1}
和 {STR_VAR_3} 放入包包的
果实袋中。土壤恢复了其
柔软和肥沃的状态。$
BerryTree_Text_PutAwayBerry_Mutation.display_text:
{PLAYER} 将 {STR_VAR_1}
和 {STR_VAR_3} 放入包包的
果实袋中。土壤恢复了其
柔软和肥沃的状态。

BerryTree_Text_WantToMulch.label: BerryTree_Text_WantToMulch
BerryTree_Text_WantToMulch.raw_text: 这是松软的土壤。\n要撒些肥料吗？$
BerryTree_Text_WantToMulch.display_text:
这是松软的土壤。
要撒些肥料吗？

BerryTree_Text_ScatteredMulch.label: BerryTree_Text_ScatteredMulch
BerryTree_Text_ScatteredMulch.raw_text: {PLAYER} 撒下了 {STR_VAR_1}的种子\n在松软的壤土上。$
BerryTree_Text_ScatteredMulch.display_text:
{PLAYER} 撒下了 {STR_VAR_1}的种子
在松软的壤土上。

BerryTree_Text_WeedIsGrowing.label: BerryTree_Text_WeedIsGrowing
BerryTree_Text_WeedIsGrowing.raw_text: 这里长了杂草。\n要拔掉它吗？$
BerryTree_Text_WeedIsGrowing.display_text:
这里长了杂草。
要拔掉它吗？
